\tzpentry{ID3814}{BlobType Rank Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3814 introduces BlobType Rank Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$BlobType \to \{ M \in \mathbb{R}^{m \times n} : Rank[M] = \min(m,n) \land \frac{\sigma_{max}}{\sigma_{min}} < \kappa \}$
\]
